articles.title: Sweden: Gradual improvement with elevated unemployment – Nordea
articles.snippet: Nordea’s Anna Westlund reports that Swedish employment has been rising since early 2025, with BAS and LFS data both showing a positive trend.

combined_text:
[0.67] Sweden: Gradual improvement with elevated unemployment – Nordea
Nordea’s Anna Westlund reports that Swedish employment has been rising since early 2025, with BAS and LFS data both showing a positive trend.
